welcome.subject: Welcome to WalletWise!
welcome.body: Thanks for signing up for WalletWise. We're excited to help you take control of your finances.

resetPassword.subject: Reset your WalletWise password
resetPassword.body: We received a request to reset your WalletWise password. Click the button below to choose a new password.
resetPassword.expiryNote: This link expires in 1 hour. If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.
